name: flux2_klein_edit
description: Flux 2 Klein 9B multi-reference image editing pipeline. Edit images using text prompts with two reference images for style/content transfer via ReferenceLatent conditioning. 20 euler steps, cfg 5.

prompt.description: Text instruction describing the edit (e.g., 'Change the background to a forest' or 'Apply the logo to the steering wheel')

image.description: Primary reference image to edit. Provides the content/layout to modify.

reference_image.description: Second reference image for style/material/branding transfer (e.g., a logo or texture to apply).
